description_long: This is an old, cylindrical glass medicine bottle with a narrow neck and a slightly flared lip. The bottle is covered in a weathered, orange and brown paper label that is partially torn and faded, but still legible in places. The label features bold black and red text, with some smaller print and decorative borders, giving it a vintage appearance. The glass itself is dark and appears to have some surface corrosion or dirt, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The base of the bottle is rounded and shows signs of wear, with some chipping and discoloration. The overall look is that of a discarded or long-forgotten medicinal container, possibly found in an urban alley or abandoned building.
description: A vintage, weathered glass medicine bottle with a faded orange label and signs of age and wear.
description_view_0: The bottom of the bottle is visible, showing a rounded, worn base with some chipping and discoloration.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the faded orange label with black and red text, and the narrow neck with a slightly flared lip.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the bottle, showing more of the worn base and the torn, aged label wrapping around the body.
description_view_3: A clear side view of the bottle, emphasizing the vintage label and the dark, weathered glass surface.
